description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/quatomic/qengine:4 Docker image and sets the GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY variable to recursive. Include a before_script that copies /app/dependencies_linux to ./dependencies_linux, copies /app/settings.txt to ./settings.txt, prints the current directory with pwd, lists files with ls, runs cmake . and then builds with make -j8. Define a test:linux job in the default test stage that executes ./bin/all-testing, runs on runners tagged "linux", and inherits the before_script. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required.
